comment: Advance widths MUST be one of the values in allowed_widths. iA Writer Quattro uses exactly 4 width classes (plus 0 for .notdef/NULL/CR). Run 'python scripts/inspect.py' on the source fonts to verify these.

modifications._comment: Map glyph names to new advance widths. All values must be in allowed_widths above. Run scripts/inspect.py to see current widths and glyph names.
